queries.description: Language extensions are compiler-specific features that are not part of the C++17 standard. Using these extensions reduces portability and may lead to unpredictable behavior when code is compiled with different compilers or compiler versions.
queries.name: A program shall conform to ISO/IEC 14882:2017 (C++17)

implementation_scope.description: This query detects pragmas, non standard attributes, some compiler-specific built-ins and nonstandard behaviors. It cannot detect all possible compiler extensions or deviations from standard C++17.

RULE-4-1-1.title: A program shall conform to ISO/IEC 14882:2017 (C++17)
